result.name: Force shield projector
result.description: Level: 1d6 + 3 Effect: Creates a shimmering energy shield around the user for one hour, during which time they gain +3 to Armor (or +4 to Armor if the cypher is level 5 or higher). Some force walls, shields, and cubes are transparent. Others are translucent. A few are opaque.

sections.name: Force shield projector
sections.effect:
Level: 1d6 + 3

Effect: Creates a shimmering energy shield around the user for one hour, during which time they gain +3 to Armor (or +4 to Armor if the cypher is level 5 or higher).

Some force walls, shields, and cubes are transparent. Others are translucent. A few are opaque.
